title: Credential Exchange — Query
description: verifier → holder. An OID4VP DCQL query with a freshness nonce and a mandatory, holder-shown purpose.

dcql_query.description: An OID4VP DCQL query (affinidi-openid4vp). Per-credential format + meta (vct_values / type_values) + claims constraints.

nonce.description: Verifier freshness nonce — bound into the holder presentation.

purpose.description: The verifier's stated reason, MANDATORY and shown to the holder (purpose binding). A verifier cannot ask without stating why.
